articles.title: Hat trick for Raphinha as Barcelona beats Sevilla 5-2 to stay 4 points clear of Madrid
articles.original_title: Hat trick for Raphinha as Barcelona beats Sevilla 5-2 to stay 4 points clear of Madrid
articles.summary: Raphinha scored a hat trick, including two goals from the penalty spot, as Barcelona reclaimed its four-point lead over Real Madrid at the top of the Spanish league on Sunday.  Barcelona routed Sevilla 5-2 for its fourth straight league win and boosted its confidence ahead of the second leg of its Champions League last 16 match against Newcastle on Wednesday.

articles.title: Reaves, Luka deliver late-game magic in OT thriller
articles.original_title: Reaves, Luka deliver late-game magic in OT thriller
articles.summary: Austin Reaves executed a perfect missed free throw before sinking the tying bucket to force overtime, and Luka Doncic drained the winning jumper in the extra frame to lift the Lakers past the Nuggets.

articles.title: Chelsea beats Man United 2-0 to retain Women's League Cup
articles.original_title: Chelsea beats Man United 2-0 to retain Women's League Cup
articles.summary: Chelsea made it back-to-back Women's League Cup trophies by beating Manchester United 2-0 in the final on Sunday.  Chelsea has been the dominant force in England over the past decade, with 18 major trophies over that period.  James put Chelsea ahead in the 19th minute and Beever-Jones doubled the lead in the 76th.

articles.title: US routs Canada in Para ice hockey final to complete historic clean sweep in Olympics, Paralympics
articles.original_title: US routs Canada in Para ice hockey final to complete historic clean sweep in Olympics, Paralympics
articles.summary: Three weeks after the United States beat Canada in the Olympic hockey finals, the Americans overcame their neighbors again to win Paralympic gold and complete the three-peat at Milan Cortina.  Jack Wallace scored a hat trick to help the U.S. beat Canada 6-2 in Sunday’s Para ice hockey final and become the first nation to sweep the hockey tournaments at the Olympics and Paralympics.  The U.S. has now won six of the past seven editions of the Winter Paralympics.

articles.title: Michael Lorenzen to start for Italy, Keider Montero for Venezuela in World Baseball Classic semi
articles.original_title: Michael Lorenzen to start for Italy, Keider Montero for Venezuela in World Baseball Classic semi
articles.summary: Michael Lorenzen will start for Italy and Keider Montero for Venezuela when the teams meet Monday night in a World Baseball Classic semifinal.  A 34-year-old right-hander, Lorenzen pitched 4 2/3 scoreless innings in the group stage 8-6 upset of the United States on Tuesday.  “I faced him many times," said Italy manager Francisco Cervelli, a former big league catcher.
